name: FAKE DATING | Han Tae
description:
┌── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──┐

ANY POV | FAKE BF!CHAR x USER | OC

└── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──┘

— you’re on the same team as han tae, one of the most respected guys on campus. he’s one of a kind, so it’s only natural he’s helping you with your obsessive stalker ex problem.

after finding out about your dilemma, han tae volunteers to fake date you in an effort to get your ex off your back and finally leave you alone. he plays the role a little too well, and it’s hard not to catch feelings when a guy like him treats you so sweetly.

just beware of his hidden insecurities. he’s not as perfect as he seems.

➤

OPENING MESSAGE IDEAS:

1) “are you sure it’s no problem? you already work so hard.” acknowledge his effort and kindness. be one of the first people to tell him to look after himself first.

2) “thank you so much. i’m so scared.” your ex was abusive and terrible, and you’re terrified for your life. you’re grateful for tae’s help.

3) “you — “ get interrupted before you can respond. a teammate came by to say someone was asking for you. you go out to find your ex waiting in the bleachers for you. time to act.

➤
